csharp.note: Pre-existing LLM flake (Query_ToolCall_LlmRequestsToolAndHandlesError) — same as v5 baseline, unchanged. 3 new OperatorTests for enum↔string normalization all green.

plang.note: Tests/TestModule/**/*.test.goal — coder v4 summary claimed 19 but actual count is 18 (F1 deleted, F4 added, F2 replaced 1:1, F3 rewrote 3:3 → net -1 = 18). Full outer suite: 167 total, 100 pass, 48 fail (pre-existing unrelated), 19 stale.

coverage.changed_files_covered: n/a — coverage rerun skipped; changes are additive (new actions/tests). See v5 baseline for delta.
coverage.notes: Added: PLang/App/modules/assert/notContains.cs (covered end-to-end by TestSystemTestGoalDoesNotUseForeach + symmetric containment branches covered via flipped-arg Contains path). Added: 3 OperatorTests for enum↔string (discharges v5 F8).

F1_tautology.deletion_test: C# PLang.Tests/App/Testing/OrchestrateBranchCoverageTests attaches a production-shaped EventType.AfterAction subscriber and asserts observations come through. If the AfterAction subscriber in run.cs:83-119 were deleted, those C# tests would fail.

F2_false_green_isolation.v4_fix: Replaced with _isolation/AIsolationPollute.fixture.goal (sets %shared_probe%=1) and _isolation/BIsolationProbe.fixture.goal (asserts %shared_probe% is null at entry); outer TestRunIsolatesMemoryStackBetweenTests runs both under parallel=1 with a count-equals-2 guard so a silent-discovery miss fails the test.
F2_false_green_isolation.deletion_test: If run.cs:75 `await using var childApp = new App.@this(test.Directory)` were changed to reuse the same App across tests (broken isolation), Probe would read the polluted %shared_probe%=1 and fail. Parallel=1 guarantees deterministic ordering (alphabetical A before B).

F3_identical_reports.v4_fix: test.report now exposes observable scalars on Data.Properties (format, reportPath, content, summaryTotal, summaryPass, summaryFail, variableSnapshotCount). The 3 Report tests now assert distinct scalars: WritesJunitXml asserts format='junit' + summaryPass + file.exists; IncludesCoverageTables asserts format='json' + summaryPass + file.exists; RendersFailureWithVariables asserts summaryFail=1 + variableSnapshotCount=1 against a _fixtures_fail fixture.
F3_identical_reports.deletion_test: PARTIAL: RendersFailureWithVariables discriminates strongly — deleting AssertionError.Variables makes variableSnapshotCount=0. But WritesJunitXml and IncludesCoverageTables have a name-claim gap: neither verifies the actual content of the written file (junit XML vs JSON coverage tables). Deleting `case "junit":` routing would leave both passing (format var is preserved regardless of the switch path taken). See F11 below.

F4_missing_elseif_match.v4_fix: Added TestConditionElseIfMatchesRecordsBranchIndex1.test.goal with %x%=7, if/elseif/else chain, asserts branchIndex=1 and %b%=2.
F4_missing_elseif_match.deletion_test: .pr correctly maps `module=condition, action=elseif`. Breaking condition.elseif to publish branchIndex=0 → first assert fails. Breaking the elseif body skip → %b% unset → second assert fails.

bonus_discharges.F5_assert_variables_snapshot: Now drills into `list.any %results% where Error.Variables.foo equals 42, write to %hasSnapshot%` + `assert %hasSnapshot% is true`. ObjectNavigator was also fixed to walk the inheritance chain so AssertionError.Variables doesn't collide with IError.Variables (AmbiguousMatchException).
bonus_discharges.F6_misleading_tagoutside_test: TestTagOutsideTestIsNoOp.test.goal deleted entirely (honest: no-op branch is unreachable from a .test.goal).
bonus_discharges.F7_stale_filter_mirror: OrchestrateBranchCoverageTests updated to use action.IsIfHead matching the new production filter. Legacy IsFirstConditionInStep kept as a Step-propagation distinguisher.
bonus_discharges.F8_operator_enum_string_unit_test: PLang.Tests/App/Modules/condition/OperatorTests.cs added 3 tests: Equal_EnumLeft_StringRight_NormalizesToEnumName, mirror, and mismatch. All green.
bonus_discharges.F9_integration_overlap: Renamed and split: TestSystemTestGoalDoesNotUseForeach uses assert.notContains (negative test); TestSystemTestGoalIncludesAllThreePhases asserts contains test.discover + test.run + test.report (positive test). Clear discrimination.
bonus_discharges.F10_timeout_cancellation: Run.cs:130 childApp.User.Context.PushCancellation(cts) + PopCancellation in finally. TestRunEnforcesTimeout wallclock dropped from ~5008ms to 1005ms. Latent runtime bug discharged.

findings.issue: Both tests assert %report.format% on the scalar observable, but neither asserts on the actual content of the written file or the filename. %report.format% just echoes back the Format parameter — it passes even if the file routing is broken. WritesJunitXml would still pass if `case "junit":` were deleted (format='junit' still set, default branch writes results.json, file still exists). IncludesCoverageTables has a name-claim about coverage-tables but only verifies format=='json' and that some file exists — deleting the branchCoverage block in BuildJson leaves the test passing.
findings.impact: Name-claim mismatch. Tests carry 'WritesJunitXml' and 'IncludesCoverageTables' in their names but don't assert the content those names imply.
findings.suggestion: Add one discriminating assert per test: WritesJunitXml → `assert %report.reportPath% contains 'junit.xml'` OR `assert %report.content% contains '<testsuites'`. IncludesCoverageTables → `assert %report.content% contains 'branchCoverage'` OR `assert %report.reportPath% contains 'results.json'`. One line per test. Not a blocker — the tests now discriminate under the deletion test for the scalar-routing itself.

latent_bugs_resolved.L1_resolved: Fixed in commit ea7aeb85. Goal gained LoadedFromPrPath property + GetRuntimeDirectory() method. Path.Resolve (Path.cs:49-73) now derives the runtime directory from where the .pr was loaded (`<dir>/.build/<name>.pr` → `<dir>`), so child-App goal-relative paths resolve correctly. Falls back to the old Goal.Path behaviour for in-memory goals (tests/fixtures built without a file path).
latent_bugs_resolved.L2_resolved: Fixed at provider level (DefaultAssertProvider.Contains:65-81). Both Contains and NotContains now check `ContainsValue(v, c) || ContainsValue(c, v)` — symmetric — so the builder LLM's Value/Container flip is tolerated. Runtime behaviour is correct regardless of which way the arguments were mapped. (Action-class parameter names still read 'backwards' to a human, but it no longer breaks tests.)

summary: All 4 major findings from tester v5 (F1-F4) discharged. Bonus: F5-F10 all discharged (F10 was flagged as out-of-scope latent runtime bug — coder shipped the cts.Token-binding fix anyway, TestRunEnforcesTimeout wallclock dropped from ~5s to 1s). C# 2274/2275 (same pre-existing LLM flake), PLang Tests/TestModule 18/18 green. One minor new finding F11: WritesJunitXml and IncludesCoverageTables have name-claims their scalar assertions don't verify — the file CONTENT isn't checked. Not a blocker; one-line fix per test. Recommend routing to security next.
